name: MatthewMaker-private-atlassian
description: Mediates interaction with the Atlassian MCP server to minimize context bloat. Provides focused Jira and Confluence access with digest-style output.

plugins.name: private-atlassian
plugins.description: Mediates interaction with the Atlassian MCP server to minimize context bloat. Provides focused Jira and Confluence access with digest-style output by default.
